environment: Pure TypeScript state machine under Node.js and the browser; no network, clock, random input, or Expanso process
modeledBehaviors: link loss changes new records from direct delivery to an in-memory queue
critical queued records sort ahead of normal queued records
reconnect leaves the queue intact until the replay event
replay drains the modeled queue in its deterministic priority order
excludedClaims: No durable buffer, delivery guarantee, timing, throughput, recovery, or operating envelope was tested
The in-memory queue and link state are deterministic simulation state
